title: Workhorse Announces 100-Truck Order from Gateway Fleets
text: Workhorse announced a 100-truck order from Gateway Fleets, a California-based provider of bundled electric vehicle and charging solutions for commercial delivery operators. This major purchase order represents Workhorse's commitment to supporting lower-cost electric fleet operations in California. Gateway Fleets, specializing in sustainable fleet solutions, selected Workhorse vehicles for their efficiency and cost-effectiveness. The order demonstrates growing market demand for Workhorse's W56 fully-electric step vans in the commercial delivery space. This follows Kingsburg Truck Center's successful partnership with Workhorse as its first certified California dealer, showing strong regional momentum in EV fleet adoption.
